_comment: Standing research questions for the OPTIONAL research-digest timer. Copy to consult.config.json on the scheduled host. The LiteLLM proxy URL + key come from the host environment ($LITELLM_BASE_URL / $LITELLM_API_KEY) — NO secret sits in this file. 'factcheck:true' opts a question into the external-web Perplexity tier; leave it off unless an unattended web reach is intended.

questions.question: What materially changed in the LiteLLM proxy's supported model list this week?
Are there new advisories affecting the studio's pinned Node 22 runtime?
